articles.title: At 19, Mirra Andreeva Saves Set Points to Become Madrid’s Second-Youngest Finalist—And She’s Just Getting Started
articles.summary: A day after her 19th birthday, Mirra Andreeva saved multiple set points in a dramatic tiebreak to edge Hailey Baptiste 6-4, 7-6 (10-8). She’s the first teenager to reach three WTA 1000 finals and now faces Marta Kostyuk, who refused a post-match handshake with her Russian-born opponent.

articles.title: Amy Allen, the Hitmaker Behind Sabrina Carpenter and ‘APT.,’ Is ASCAP’s Songwriter of the Year
articles.summary: Amy Allen, co-writer of Sabrina Carpenter’s “Manchild,” “Tears,” and the viral smash “APT.” by Rosé and Bruno Mars, took home Songwriter of the Year at the ASCAP Pop Awards. Laufey received the Creative Voice Award, celebrating her genre-blending pop-jazz sound.

articles.title: Chef Jon Kung on the Kitchen Gear They Swear By—and the One Invention They’re Still Waiting For
articles.summary: From a sticker-covered SMEG fridge to a dream rice cooker that washes rice, chef Jon Kung shares their must-have tools and hilarious regrets. The TikTok star, known for third-culture Chinese feasts, also explains why unwashed rice contains bug eggs and why you should never buy combo pans.
